meta.note: Task 11 mitigations landed: hasStackedSurface short-circuit on stack inference, narrowed stackInferenceBudget to 20, memoised digit-splice offsets so repeat insertions in a letter run re-parse the prefix once. The remaining gap vs. the bda25bf pre-task-09 baseline (long p95 ~2190us vs. ~922us) is the irreducible cost of the second DP parse that task 09's implicit stack inference requires on <V>n<C> buffers (mingal, mingalar, shinbyar, etc.). Closing it further requires either (a) parser-level changes so kinzi surfaces emerge from a single DP traversal, or (b) dropping the task 09 correctness wins — both declared out of scope for task 11.
